creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
Building sambas412 in a clean jail.

Checking for system tevent (>=0.10.2)                                                           : yes 
ERROR: Python module pytevent of version 0.10.2 not found, and bundling disabled
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

Verified that tdb was build with python support:

# pkg info -d -F /usr/ports/packages/All/tdb-1.4.7,1.pkg
tdb-1.4.7,1:
        gettext-runtime-0.21
        python39-3.9.13

Last successful build:

# pkg info -d -F /usr/ports/packages/Old/samba412-4.12.15_4.pkg
samba412-4.12.15_4:
        avahi-app-0.8
        gamin-0.1.10_10
        gettext-runtime-0.21
        gnutls-3.7.6
        jansson-2.14
        libarchive-3.6.1,1
        libgcrypt-1.9.4_1
        libiconv-1.16
        libinotify-20211018
        libsunacl-1.0.1
        libtasn1-4.18.0
        libunwind-20211201_1
        lmdb-0.9.29_1,1
        openldap26-client-2.6.2
        openssl-1.1.1q,1
        popt-1.18_1
        py39-dnspython-2.2.1,1
        py39-markdown-3.3.7
        python39-3.9.13
        readline-8.1.2
        talloc-2.3.1
        tdb-1.4.3,1
        tevent-0.10.2_1

# pkg info -F /usr/ports/packages/Old/samba412-4.12.15_4.pkg
samba412-4.12.15_4

        GPGME          : off
